name: live2d-haxe
description: Live2D Cubism SDK for Haxe - GPU shader rendering with multi-backend abstraction (cpp + hl, OpenFL/Flixel/Heaps)
releasenote: v0.8.0: Extension Layer — 5 cross-backend extensions (L2DMotionQueue, L2DLookAt, L2DLipSync, L2DEventDispatcher, L2DModelConstants macro) + IL2DAudioSource/IL2DInputAdapter interfaces + 3 backend InputAdapters (OpenFL/Flixel/Heaps). Zero native changes, all backends supported. No breaking changes to existing APIs.
